description: It helps in review and check-in, and goal management for all employees. We majorly use 30 days and 90 days feedback.
author: Neelam R.
pros: Anonymous Reviews, a very user-friendly tool, integration is easy and quick.
cons: At times it's difficult for me to search for a specific report.

description: My overall experience with PerformYard has been positive, especially because its a comprehensive performance management solution that transforms our evaluation processes, enabling us to achieve our goals. Its excellent, and I would definitely recommend it.
author: Mariajose M.
pros: I like the flexibility in the process design and I value the ability to adapt and supplement the forms and evaluation cycles to align them, and I love its interface, its totally intuitive.
cons: For now, I dont like is the employee synchronization with HRIS systems. bu the rest of the platform works well and I like it.

review_title: Good products don't need to hold you hostage
description: Seemed good during the demo but after signing up we found it lacking in the functionality we needed. It's clunky and not intuitive. My team did not find the value in it we hoped when we demoed it. We tried to use it for a few months and my team didn't see the value in it and did not want to use it. It took more time and effort than the benefit we saw. We paid for a year in advance and chose not to renew the contract. They then informed us that we had a 3 year NON CANCELABLE contract and are trying to force us to pay thousands per year for 2 more years for a product we don't use or find value in. What does this say about the company? Thats as terrible of an experience as any company can provide. . If a product provides value we'd keep using it. Evidently they think holding customers hostage and forcing them to pay whether they find value in the product or not is a good way to do business. It is not!! Only companies whose products or services are weak need to try to force contracts like this. We signed up in good faith thinking the product was more useful than it turned out to be. Its just crazy that they are trying to force us to pay for something we don't use or want. Buyer beware. There are tons of competitive products that do more, cost less and are willing to prove their value rather than depend on the dishonest and poor service business model that depends on holding people hostage.
author: Jamie H.
pros: It seemed like it would be useful but it was not for us. The demo looked like what we were looking for but it did not match our needs. We paid for a year and tried to use it but did not find value. They are now trying to force us to pay for 2 more years for a product we don't use. Thats as low as it gets for a business. You only see what they want to show you in a demo. Its dishonest to force people to pay for a product you don't use. We would never have signed up had we known.
cons: Not intuitive. Clunky to use,lacking scheduling ability, reporting is poor, was not as useful as expected. Company depends on forcing contracts rather than providing value.

review_title: Ideal for simplified and effective performance management
description: My experience has been positive because it is effective in transforming performance management into a continuous process and it benefits me greatly by getting rid of manual proceeses.
author: Hasina A.
pros: I really like flexibility, and as a human resources manager, its important to me because it allows me to manage multiple types of assessments within the platform, which saves a lot of time and also allows me to tailor feedback to the actual needs of the team.
cons: So far, what I dont like is the customization, because we need options and I see it as limited. thats the only negative.

description: A robust platform that digitizes and optimizes performance, reducing administrative tasks and enabling complete customization
author: Michelle K.
pros: The major advantage is that it combines the flexibility to configure customized performance cycles and with excellent goal management
cons: The reporting functionality should be more sophisticated to provide predictive analytics and deeper data, ideally without requiring extensive setup

review_title: Alignment of objectives and Goodbye to complicated reviews
description: It has been a profound tool for performance management without the excessive complexity of suites, and it allows linking individual goals with those of the company
author: Gabriel W.
pros: I appreciate that it adapts to different performance cycles, facilitates goal tracking, and automated reminders
cons: Initially, configuring the system to reflect complex processes may require more learning time, that´s all.

description: PerformYard helps me keep track of my goals and performance at work, it's very intuitive!
author: Courtney B.
pros: Overall, PerformYard does a great job with core performance management.
cons: It requires some workarounds and manual effort in certain areas.

review_title: Terrible experience, do not use them!
description: Terrible, I would never recommend this company to anyone. If you’re looking for a similar product choose a competitor.
author: Michael C.
pros: Nothing. There is noting good about this company. They value money over helping their customers. Do not contract with them.
cons: Terrible customer service, force you into a 3 year contract with no exit. Do not use them you will regret it.

description: The application is clear and concise. It is a clear passage for employee and employer to monitor progress and attention to certain aspects of my position.
author: Joshua A.
pros: Accountability and transparency. I appreciate the fact that I am able to review my own personal progress and reflect on past notes.
cons: I have yet to have any direct complaints or concerns at this time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Positive experience. The software effectively does it just job, but does not go above and beyond.
author: Alan O.
pros: Very easy to use and navigate. Meets all basic needs and requirements related to function
cons: Very basic - no advanced or special features

description: Our overall experience has been very positive. As a growing company, we very much needed a mechanism to ensure that goal setting and feedback was occuring on a regular cadence on a company wide basis. We also wanted a platform to recognize co-workers efforts on a company wide basis. Ensuring feedback happens and is documented is invaluable for employee growth. The feedback from employees has been great. Many of them are coming from large companies with mature performance management processes and have indicated they think PerformYard is a superior product - more updated, easier to use and better features.
author: Alexandria G.
pros: The User Platform is easy to navigate and understand. Creating forms and launching review cycles is simple once one learns the basics. I really appreciate the Gmail single sign on. I love the recognition feature. Our CSM has been amazing - accessible, helpful and very attentive. Having our performance reviews managed through the platform has been a huge benefit and needed for the engagement and growth.
cons: I have not found any things I dislike about the software to date. On my wishlist for product improvements - a visually appealing Org Chart option. That would be awesome and very helpful!

review_title: PY Product Review by D. Partridge, Sage Analysis Group, Inc. 2.12.21
description: The best part of our experience with PerformYard has to be with the customer service. Our rep, [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] knows how we function, is extremely helpful making suggestions, reworking forms streamlining tasks for us. We are a small group but have recently revamped all of our performance materials - [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has been instrumental in our successful rollout.
author: Diane P.
pros: I am getting better all the time at utilizing the software for our different needs and making sure that I can train our staff to be more independent. Features that work well are the profile set up, cycle launches, ability to edit through simple prompts. The forms look nice and are easily read. I've learned how to utilize more icons and tricks to get my tasks done more efficiently than in the beginning.
cons: We found it difficult to format the text boxes with some symbols, bullets, etc. The texting is very straight forward and doesn't allow for easy organization of remarks. It would be better to be able to upload tables, or symbols, bold and separation effects to make reading long texts more easily defined. Multiple projects, data gathered, etc. become long run-on looking sentences. I'd like to be able to print an org chart that looks nice and other snapshots of screen for training seem to be low resolution quality and hard to duplicate.

author: Tracy O.
pros: What I like most are the people at PerformYard! From the initial interactions with the sales team to the implementation it was clear PerformYard was interested in being my partner in creating a high performing organization. Our account rep consults with me to understand and then find the best solutions for my company. She is a tremendous trainer and supports my learning style by getting on the phone with me when needed! She is friendly, professional, and savvy. The software is user friendly and administrator friendly. The feature I like most for our users are the dashboard, everything in the Goals tab, and the ability for folks to isolate their views with filters or "forms I need to do" section. The "Feedback" button is fast way to share feedback. Overall the software is aesthetically appealing; an important thing to highly visual architects and interior designers. Additionally, the pricing is fair.
cons: Only two small things fall on my least list: I don't believe the "activity streams" on the dashboard or in goals are leveraged by our employees. Sometimes the back button does not take you to the previous page but all the way back to the front of the function. On my wishlist: The Feedback icon gives the ability to GIVE feedback to anyone in the organization. I wish we could have the same open design, but in the reverse; allowing anyone in my organization to REQUEST feedback from anyone in the organization. Having open design for both giving feedback and receiving feedback support a culture of feedback! I believe functionality like this would be a differentiator for PerformYard in the performance market.

description: Excellent experience! I’d recommend performyard to everyone!
author: Brittany D.
pros: It’s easy to navigate. Everything is set up to where it is easy to understand.
cons: Nothing. Everything was good. I had no issues at all!

description: Overall, I would say that my experience with PerformYard was very good. It does exactly what I need it to do.
author: Romario R.
pros: I love how user-intuitive PerformYard is. It never takes long for me to accomplish my task.
cons: My least favorite part about PerformYard would probably be that it doesn't allow me to request a peer review.

description: My experience has being very good no issues at all. I will definitely recommend this platform to my friends that owns company's
author: Nigel C.
pros: what I like about perform yard is that I can review my self and know when I am not preforming
cons: I honestly don't find anything wrong . But if it was anything I will make a beta dashboard

description: Very easy functionality. Shows you what you need to complete easily.
author: PATRICK F.
pros: Easy to use. Shows me what I need to complete and who needs to complete the task.
cons: Nothing stands out. It is very user friendly

description: over the years has been an easy program and no issues on my end
author: Yvonne G.
pros: Everything is online and do not have to interact with a human
cons: I've used this program for quite a few years and have had no complaints

review_title: optimize an individual performance to align organisation goals
description: Overall experience is really good and easy to use. Also this is one stop solution for employee management during the tenure in organisation.
author: Vikram M.
pros: The goal management, performance reviews, and feedback options are user-friendly and simple to implement. They greatly enhance my organization's ability to maximize employee performance, development, and engagement.
cons: There are no cons as of now. Infact this is very easy to use.

description: Great user experience that allows each user ease of use and navigation.
author: Dragos Cristian V.
pros: Easy to use, navigate and learn. The website is not cluttered and has just the right of information when navigating.
cons: I can't think of a single CON as of today.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good product, could use some updates/refinement
author: michael G.
pros: aesthetically pleasant, simple format, ease of use
cons: The reminder emails need to be changed to only be sent to recipients with incomplete tasks.

author: TaKira D.
pros: I like that I can come in and see my metrics and get the feedback and coaching
cons: No Cons really. Since I been using it it's been great
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: doris Q.
pros: Ease of use for employees * feedback/engagement
cons: learning new technology - not a perform yard issue

author: MARC C.
pros: It’s user friendly and a handy tool for our operations
cons: I can not find anything wrong so far of using it

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The profile setup is easy to compile and the goals sections well developed, easy to set up and update
cons: The texting is very straight forward and doesn't allow for easy organization of remarks.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
